category_sources: source_facts.description says Spawn FastCGI processes; official lighttpd project page describes spawn-fcgi as used to spawn FastCGI applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official lighttpd Redmine and git repository use spawn-fcgi.
docs_sources: Official lighttpd Redmine wiki is the project wiki; official git repository README is a documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official lighttpd download index gives git clone https://git.lighttpd.net/lighttpd/spawn-fcgi.git; official Gitea repository is git.lighttpd.net/lighttpd/spawn-fcgi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README/wiki describe binding sockets, privilege separation, chroot, and FastCGI application spawning.
